# Lucidchart Mappings
#
# Maps local draw.io files to a Lucidchart team folder ID.
# Format: path/to/diagram.drawio=lucidchart_folder_id
#
# Find your team folder ID in the Lucidchart URL:
#   https://lucid.app/documents#/teams/<FOLDER_ID>?folder_id=teamFiles-<FOLDER_ID>
#
# Note: Each import creates a NEW Lucidchart document.
# The Lucid API does not update existing documents in place.
#
# Example:
# _static/sdd-review-flow.drawio=YOUR_FOLDER_ID
# _static/pr-review-flow.drawio=YOUR_FOLDER_ID
